About.title: about me
About.description: i'm a second year computer science student at ufpb, focusing on full-stack web development and artificial intelligence. my technical work bridges the construction of applications in react, next.js, and java with the practical application of ocr and natural language processing (nlp) models. i enjoy solving competitive programming questions in my free time; i find it fun to rack my brain over problems. to do all this, i use linux as my main ecosystem. outside of code, i seek balance through drawing, music, and nintendo games.

Hero.title: larissa gondim
Hero.subtitle: computer science student and artificial intelligence enthusiast.

Projects.title: pauta – intelligent legislative analysis system
Projects.shortDescription: an AI and NLP platform designed to process municipal legislative data, generating automated summaries and semantic mapping for candidate recommendations.
contributionsAndAchievements: architected the NLP preprocessing workflow, including text cleaning, tokenization, lemmatization, and stopword filtering.
integrated the groq API for intelligent, automated summarization of complex political proposals.
implemented semantic representation modeling by combining BERT embeddings and an autoencoder to refine the recommendation engine.

Projects.title: pokémon ADT
Projects.shortDescription: a low-level pokémon battle simulation engine developed in c, focusing on strict abstract data type (ADT) concepts and optimized memory management.
contributionsAndAchievements: built a low-level modular architecture that encapsulates pokémon lifecycles, moves, and attributes via strict contracts in .h header files.
modeled and implemented core game algorithms for official damage calculation, status modifiers, and type effectiveness charts.
maintained rigorous control over dynamic memory allocation (malloc/free) to guarantee clean execution and prevent memory leaks.
manipulated strings and pointers directly to emulate a turn-based action execution queue inside the terminal.

Projects.title: java tech wordle (termo-java)
Projects.shortDescription: a customized adaptation of the wordle/termo game themed around the tech universe, built with solid OOP principles and a native desktop graphical interface.
contributionsAndAchievements: developed a native graphical user interface using javaFX, implementing reactive visual feedback for user guesses.
architected a robust domain model leveraging design patterns and java 21 encapsulation and reusability features.
built a dynamic word validation system backed by a custom dictionary focused on technical terms and developer culture.
implemented local data reading and persistence logic to manage game states and track player progress history.

Projects.title: beecrowd solutions
Projects.shortDescription: a collection of competitive programming and algorithmic problems solved in c, c++, and python, tracking continuous learning in logic and data structures.
contributionsAndAchievements: implemented optimal solutions for diverse algorithmic challenges covering arrays, matrices, strings, and mathematical logic.
focused on code efficiency, runtime optimization, and memory constraints required by competitive platforms.
structured a clean and organized repository architecture to easily track individual problem resolutions.
maintained a continuous daily coding routine to strengthen problem-solving speed and algorithmic analysis.

Experience.shortDescription: practical training and immersion in web/mobile software development, focusing on programming best practices, architecture, and version control.
achievements: collaborated in teams to develop a web application designed to store post-operative information for medical patients.
learned and applied front-end, back-end, data, and AI technologies, alongside version control tools using Git/GitHub.
participated in mentorships and networking opportunities that accelerated my technical and professional growth.

Experience.shortDescription: collaboration on the development of AI computing solutions focused on digitizing handwritten processes within the healthcare and hospital sector.
achievements: developed image processing and OCR pipelines to digitize handwritten medical prescriptions.
conducted scientific research on multimodal vision-language modeling applied to clinical document recognition.
focused on mitigating human errors in interpretation and optimizing response times within hospital triage workflows.

Experience.company: tail (technology and artificial intelligence league - ufpb)
Experience.shortDescription: training in data science and artificial intelligence through classes, activities, and hands-on projects.
achievements: built study notebooks focused on python, pandas, numpy, scikit-learn, tensorflow, and keras.
developed the pauta project, centered on web scraping and extracting legislative data from municipal chambers.
engineered structured text cleaning workflows, tokenization, lemmatization, and topic modeling processes.
leveraged LLMs via groq API alongside BERT embeddings and autoencoder architectures for recommendation engines.
